# unifi_firewall_zone (Resource)

A zone-based firewall zone on the UniFi controller. A zone groups one or more networks so firewall policies can reference traffic between zones.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A firewall zone grouping the IoT network so zone-based policies can target it.
resource "unifi_network" "iot" {
  name    = "IoT Devices"
  vlan_id = 20
  enabled = true
}

resource "unifi_firewall_zone" "iot" {
  name        = "IoT"
  network_ids = [unifi_network.iot.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Firewall zone name.

### Optional

- `network_ids` (Set of String) UUIDs of the networks that belong to this zone.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Firewall zone UUID.
